question: Top 3 products by revenue
sql: SELECT p.product_name, ROUND(SUM(oi.sale_price * oi.quantity), 2) as revenue FROM analysis-ai-499819.jd_sports.order_items oi JOIN analysis-ai-499819.jd_sports.products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id JOIN analysis-ai-499819.jd_sports.orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id WHERE o.status IN ('delivered', 'shipped') GROUP BY p.product_name ORDER BY revenue DESC LIMIT 3
ground_truth: 1. The North Face Nuptse Jacket - £530.00, 2. Nike Air Force 1 Low - £300.00, 3. Adidas Ultraboost Light - £280.00

question: Brand with most revenue
sql: SELECT p.brand, ROUND(SUM(oi.sale_price * oi.quantity), 2) as revenue FROM analysis-ai-499819.jd_sports.order_items oi JOIN analysis-ai-499819.jd_sports.products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id JOIN analysis-ai-499819.jd_sports.orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id WHERE o.status IN ('delivered', 'shipped') GROUP BY p.brand ORDER BY revenue DESC LIMIT 1

question: Total orders (delivered + shipped)
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM analysis-ai-499819.jd_sports.orders WHERE status IN ('delivered', 'shipped')

question: Total quantity sold
sql: SELECT SUM(quantity) as total_qty FROM analysis-ai-499819.jd_sports.order_items oi JOIN analysis-ai-499819.jd_sports.orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id WHERE o.status IN ('delivered', 'shipped')

question: Total revenue (delivered + shipped)
sql: SELECT ROUND(SUM(oi.sale_price * oi.quantity), 2) as total_revenue FROM analysis-ai-499819.jd_sports.order_items oi JOIN analysis-ai-499819.jd_sports.orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id WHERE o.status IN ('delivered', 'shipped')

question: Orders via online channel
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM analysis-ai-499819.jd_sports.orders WHERE channel = 'online' AND status IN ('delivered', 'shipped')

question: Online channel revenue
sql: SELECT ROUND(SUM(oi.sale_price * oi.quantity), 2) as online_revenue FROM analysis-ai-499819.jd_sports.order_items oi JOIN analysis-ai-499819.jd_sports.orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id WHERE o.channel = 'online' AND o.status IN ('delivered', 'shipped')

question: Store revenue
sql: SELECT ROUND(SUM(oi.sale_price * oi.quantity), 2) as store_revenue FROM analysis-ai-499819.jd_sports.order_items oi JOIN analysis-ai-499819.jd_sports.orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id WHERE o.channel = 'store' AND o.status IN ('delivered', 'shipped')

question: Region with highest revenue
sql: SELECT o.region, ROUND(SUM(oi.sale_price * oi.quantity), 2) as revenue FROM analysis-ai-499819.jd_sports.order_items oi JOIN analysis-ai-499819.jd_sports.orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id WHERE o.status IN ('delivered', 'shipped') GROUP BY o.region ORDER BY revenue DESC LIMIT 1

question: Returns count and return rate
sql: SELECT COUNTIF(returned = true) as returned_count, COUNT(*) as total_items, ROUND(COUNTIF(returned = true) / COUNT(*) * 100, 2) as return_rate FROM analysis-ai-499819.jd_sports.order_items oi JOIN analysis-ai-499819.jd_sports.orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id WHERE o.status IN ('delivered', 'shipped')
ground_truth: 1 returned out of 17 items, return rate 5.88%
original_ground_truth: 2 returned out of 18 items, return rate 11.11%

question: The North Face Nuptse Jacket stock at Glasgow
sql: SELECT i.stock_level, i.reorder_point FROM analysis-ai-499819.jd_sports.inventory_items i JOIN analysis-ai-499819.jd_sports.products p ON i.product_id = p.product_id WHERE p.product_name = 'The North Face Nuptse Jacket' AND i.distribution_center = 'Glasgow'

question: Highest stock at Manchester DC
sql: SELECT p.product_name, i.stock_level FROM analysis-ai-499819.jd_sports.inventory_items i JOIN analysis-ai-499819.jd_sports.products p ON i.product_id = p.product_id WHERE i.distribution_center = 'Manchester' ORDER BY i.stock_level DESC LIMIT 1

question: ASICS Gel Kayano 31 stock at Glasgow
sql: SELECT i.stock_level, i.reorder_point FROM analysis-ai-499819.jd_sports.inventory_items i JOIN analysis-ai-499819.jd_sports.products p ON i.product_id = p.product_id WHERE p.product_name = 'ASICS Gel Kayano 31' AND i.distribution_center = 'Glasgow'

question: Total inventory across all DCs
sql: SELECT SUM(stock_level) as total_stock FROM analysis-ai-499819.jd_sports.inventory_items

question: Region with most delivered+shipped orders
sql: SELECT region, COUNT(*) as count FROM analysis-ai-499819.jd_sports.orders WHERE status IN ('delivered', 'shipped') GROUP BY region ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 1

question: Hoka Clifton 9 RRP and cost price
sql: SELECT rrp, cost_price FROM analysis-ai-499819.jd_sports.products WHERE product_name = 'Hoka Clifton 9'

question: The North Face Nuptse Jacket RRP and cost price
sql: SELECT rrp, cost_price FROM analysis-ai-499819.jd_sports.products WHERE product_name = 'The North Face Nuptse Jacket'

question: Average sale price
sql: SELECT ROUND(AVG(sale_price), 2) as avg_price FROM analysis-ai-499819.jd_sports.order_items oi JOIN analysis-ai-499819.jd_sports.orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id WHERE o.status IN ('delivered', 'shipped')

question: Lowest-priced active product
sql: SELECT brand, product_name, rrp FROM analysis-ai-499819.jd_sports.products WHERE is_active = true ORDER BY rrp ASC LIMIT 1

question: Highest-priced active product
sql: SELECT brand, product_name, rrp FROM analysis-ai-499819.jd_sports.products WHERE is_active = true ORDER BY rrp DESC LIMIT 1
ground_truth: The North Face - The North Face Nuptse Jacket - £265.00

question: Platinum loyalty customers
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM analysis-ai-499819.jd_sports.users WHERE loyalty_tier = 'platinum'

question: Most common loyalty tier
sql: SELECT loyalty_tier, COUNT(*) as count FROM analysis-ai-499819.jd_sports.users GROUP BY loyalty_tier ORDER BY count DESC
ground_truth: gold: 3, silver: 3, standard: 3, platinum: 1 (three-way tie for most common)

question: Nike Air Force 1 Low distribution center and stock
sql: SELECT i.distribution_center, i.stock_level FROM analysis-ai-499819.jd_sports.inventory_items i JOIN analysis-ai-499819.jd_sports.products p ON i.product_id = p.product_id WHERE p.product_name = 'Nike Air Force 1 Low'

question: Hoka Clifton 9 distribution center and stock
sql: SELECT i.distribution_center, i.stock_level FROM analysis-ai-499819.jd_sports.inventory_items i JOIN analysis-ai-499819.jd_sports.products p ON i.product_id = p.product_id WHERE p.product_name = 'Hoka Clifton 9'

question: Total products count
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM analysis-ai-499819.jd_sports.products
